items.name: zeropl/2FA
items.full_text: Easy2FA turns a 2FA secret into its live 6-digit code, entirely in your browser. There's no server, no sign-up, and no database — each "account" is just a bookmarkable URL with the secret in its #fragment (which browsers never send over the network).
